hero.label: Apartment building management
hero.title: Apartment building management without the chaos
hero.subtitle: Technical, financial and communication management for apartment buildings — clear, reliable and focused on the needs of owners.

services.label: Services
services.title: What we handle for your building
services.description: Comprehensive management of an apartment building covering technical maintenance, finances and communication with owners.

items.title: Technical management
items.text: Day-to-day requests, maintenance and coordination with suppliers.

items.title: Financial management
items.text: Clear bookkeeping, payments and documents for owners.

items.title: Communication
items.text: Meetings, voting and clear information for owners.

steps.title: We assess the building
steps.text: We review the technical, financial and communication needs of the building.

steps.title: We propose a plan
steps.text: We prepare a clear approach, priorities and a way to work with owners.

steps.title: We run the management
steps.text: We coordinate requests, service, finances and communication throughout the year.

items.title: Transparency
items.text: Owners deserve a clear view of what's happening in the building.

items.title: Integrity
items.text: Managing a building must be responsible, factual and reliable.

items.title: Management
items.text: Technical, financial and organisational matters need clear leadership.

items.title: Action
items.text: Problems shouldn't be delayed. They need to be addressed in time.

finalCta.title: Looking for more reliable management for your building?
finalCta.text: Get in touch and let's look at your building's needs together.

hero.label: ISMABA services
hero.title: Services for renovation and management of apartment buildings
hero.subtitle: We help owners with the technical, financial and organisational needs of the building — from insulation and heating to renovation financing and insurance.

grid.label: Services
grid.title: What we'll take care of
grid.description: Five key areas we cover with a focus on clarity, responsibility and a long-term plan.

steps.title: Assessment
steps.text: We look at the current technical, financial or organisational state of the building.

steps.title: Solution proposal
steps.text: We prepare a clear approach, priorities, budget and supporting materials for owners.

steps.title: Owners' decision
steps.text: We help with communication, explaining options and preparing for meetings or voting.

steps.title: Delivery and oversight
steps.text: We coordinate suppliers, deadlines, documentation and ongoing oversight.

items.title: Clarity
items.text: A clear picture of the building's state, finances and plan of works. No confusion.

items.title: Responsibility
items.text: A factual approach, agreed deadlines and transparent communication with owners.

items.title: Communication
items.text: Meetings, voting and ongoing updates so everyone knows what's going on.

items.title: Long-term plan
items.text: Solutions for today and tomorrow — we think about what the building needs in five years.

cta.title: Need to handle a service for your building?
cta.text: Send us a message and we'll look at the options for your building.

zateplenie.title: Insulation
zateplenie.description: Façade renovation and lower energy consumption for the building.
bullets: coordination of the project and execution
zateplenie.intro: We help owners prepare a renovation that is technically sound, financially clear and well communicated. From the initial assessment to coordinating delivery, we make sure the modernisation has a clear plan.
includes: assessment of the building's technical condition
coordinating the budget and delivery steps
helps: we explain renovation options in clear terms
we prepare materials for meetings and voting
we oversee the smooth running of the project
zateplenie.suitableFor: For buildings planning façade renovation, insulation or broader modernisation of shared parts.

kurenie.title: Heating
kurenie.description: Solutions for efficient, safe and reliable heating.
kurenie.intro: Heating management requires expertise, regular inspections and good coordination of service work. We address heating matters so that operations are stable, safe and efficient long-term.
includes: tracking the technical needs of equipment
helps: we help prevent outages and confusion
we keep owners informed of key steps and progress
kurenie.suitableFor: For buildings that want heating under control and need a reliable partner for service and technical coordination.

elektrina.title: Electricity
elektrina.description: Management of electrical wiring, inspections and technical requirements.
elektrina.intro: Electrical wiring and equipment are essential to the safe operation of the building. We manage inspections, plan repairs and address technical requirements so the building's operation stays safe and clear.
helps: we coordinate technical solutions and inspections
we maintain a clear overview of duties and deadlines
we help plan repairs and modernisation systematically
elektrina.suitableFor: For buildings that need to address the safety, maintenance or renovation of electrical systems and wiring.

financovanie.title: Renovation financing
financovanie.description: Help with a financing plan for renovation and modernisation of the building.
financovanie.intro: Renovation needs not only a good technical plan but also a sensible financial setup. We help owners arrange financing so that the options are clear, comparable and sustainable long-term.
helps: we prepare clear information for decision-making
we explain financial options in understandable terms
we connect the technical plan with realistic financing
financovanie.suitableFor: For buildings planning a larger renovation, investments or wanting a better setup of the repair fund and financing for next steps.

poistenie.title: Insurance
poistenie.description: A clear insurance solution for the building and related risks.
poistenie.intro: Building insurance should match real needs and risks. We help owners gain a better overview of coverage, communication with the insurer and the steps involved in claims.
helps: we help owners understand what is covered
we support communication during claim events
we improve clarity and confidence when handling insurance matters
poistenie.suitableFor: For buildings that want to be sure their insurance solution matches the building's real needs.

hero.label: About us
hero.title: Building management stands on trust, clarity and responsibility.
hero.subtitle: ISMABA helps apartment-building owners address the technical, financial and organisational needs of the building clearly and reliably.

mission.label: Our mission
mission.title: Our goal is a calmer-running building
mission.text: An apartment building is a shared space of many owners. That's why it needs management that is factual, understandable and sustainable long-term.

items.title: Transparency
items.text: Owners deserve a clear view of what's happening in the building.

items.title: Integrity
items.text: Managing a building must be responsible, factual and reliable.

items.title: Management
items.text: Technical, financial and organisational matters need clear leadership.

items.title: Action
items.text: Problems shouldn't be delayed. They need to be addressed in time.

items.title: Clear communication
items.text: Owners receive understandable information and materials — no technical jargon.

items.title: Technical overview
items.text: We look at the building as a whole — from the façade to heating and electricity.

items.title: Responsible approach to finances
items.text: We run the building's finances with clear rules and an eye on the long-term plan.

cta.title: Want to see what management of your building could look like?

hero.title: Let's look at what your apartment building needs.
hero.subtitle: Write or call us. We're happy to get in touch and agree on next steps.
